description: You are a digital media librarian managing the Chinook music store catalog in LibreOffice Base. In the database chinook.odb, create a saved SQL query named 'FullTrackCatalog' that performs a 5-table join across Track, Album, Artist, Genre, and MediaType tables to produce at minimum: TrackId, track Name (as TrackName), album Title (as AlbumTitle), artist Name (as ArtistName), genre Name (as GenreName), media type Name (as MediaTypeName), Milliseconds, and UnitPrice. Create a saved SQL query named 'GenreMediaBreakdown' that joins Genre, Track, and MediaType tables, grouped by genre and media type, to compute TrackCount and total revenue (SUM of UnitPrice). Create a table named 'TrackReview' with columns ReviewId (integer, primary key), TrackId (integer), Rating (integer), ReviewText (long text), and ReviewDate (date). Insert at least 5 review rows into TrackReview using diverse track IDs (valid range: 1-3503) and ratings between 1 and 5. Finally, create a report named 'Media Catalog' or 'Track Catalog' presenting the catalog data.
